name: aws
description: AWS cloud infrastructure management via the AWS CLI. Ask Claude to run any aws command — EC2, S3, EKS, RDS, IAM, CloudFormation, Lambda, CloudWatch, and more.

tools.name: aws
tools.description:
Run any AWS CLI command. Pass all arguments after 'aws' as an array.

Examples:
- List EC2 instances: ["ec2", "describe-instances", "--output", "table"]
- List S3 buckets: ["s3", "ls"]
- EKS clusters: ["eks", "list-clusters", "--region", "us-east-1"]
- CloudFormation stacks: ["cloudformation", "list-stacks", "--stack-status-filter", "CREATE_COMPLETE"]
- RDS instances: ["rds", "describe-db-instances", "--output", "json"]
- IAM roles: ["iam", "list-roles", "--query", "Roles[*].RoleName"]
